nodes.label: AppIcon-20x20@3x.png (iOS, 60x60px rendered)
nodes.description: iOS app icon at 20x20pt @3x resolution (60x60px). Depicts a stylized letter 'D' formed by a thick purple/blue arc, with small colored circular nodes (pink/red and purple) positioned along the arc, evoking a graph or git commit chain. White background with rounded appearance suitable for iOS icon display.
